title: mentha longifolia f. viridescens
intro: Mentha longifolia f. viridescens, also known as Woolly Mint or Green-tinged Horse Mint, is a subspecies of the Mentha longifolia plant, characterized by its distinctive woolly leaves and greenish tint. The medicinal properties of Mentha longifolia f. viridescens include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which contribute to its various health benefits. The health benefits of using Woolly Mint include relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and headaches, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and antimicrobial agent. Mentha longifolia f. viridescens can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be consumed or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
